concepts.name: Sets, operations, and power set.
concepts.description: Sets and their representation; Union, intersection and complement of sets and their algebraic properties; Power set

concepts.name: Relations and functions
concepts.description: Relations, type of relations, equivalence relations, functions; one-one, into and onto functions, the composition of functions

concepts.name: Complex numbers and Argand diagram
concepts.description: Complex numbers as ordered pairs of reals, Representation of complex numbers in the form a+ib, Argand diagram, algebra of complex numbers, modulus and argument

concepts.name: Quadratic equations and roots
concepts.description: Quadratic equations in real and complex number systems and their solutions; Relations between roots and coefficients, nature of roots, the formation of quadratic equations with given roots

concepts.name: Matrix algebra and determinants
concepts.description: Matrices, algebra of matrices, type of matrices, determinants and matrices of order two and three, evaluation of determinants, area of triangles using determinants

concepts.name: Matrix inverse and linear equations
concepts.description: Adjoint and inverse of a square matrix; Test of consistency and solution of simultaneous linear equations in two or three variables using matrices

concepts.name: Counting, permutations and combinations
concepts.description: The fundamental principle of counting, permutations and combinations; Meaning of P(n,r) and C(n,r). Simple applications

concepts.name: Binomial theorem and applications
concepts.description: Binomial theorem for a positive integral index, general term and middle term and simple applications

concepts.name: Arithmetic and geometric progressions
concepts.description: Arithmetic and Geometric progressions, insertion of arithmetic, geometric means between two given numbers, Relation between A.M and G.M

concepts.name: Function types and graphs
concepts.description: Real-valued functions, algebra of functions (polynomial, rational, trigonometric, logarithmic and exponential functions); inverse functions. Graphs of simple functions

concepts.name: Limits, continuity, differentiation rules
concepts.description: Limits, continuity and differentiability. Differentiation of the sum, difference, product and quotient of two functions

concepts.name: Advanced differentiation techniques
concepts.description: Differentiation of trigonometric, inverse trigonometric, logarithmic, exponential, composite and implicit functions; derivatives of order upto two

concepts.name: Applications of derivatives
concepts.description: Rate of change of quantities, monotonic-Increasing and decreasing functions, Maxima and minima of functions of one variable

concepts.name: Integration techniques
concepts.description: Integral as an anti-derivative, Fundamental integrals involving algebraic, trigonometric, exponential and logarithmic functions. Integration by substitution, by parts and by partial fractions. Integration using trigonometric identities. Evaluation of simple integrals

concepts.name: Definite integrals and areas
concepts.description: The fundamental theorem of calculus, properties of definite integrals. Evaluation of definite integrals, determining areas of the regions bounded by simple curves

concepts.name: Ordinary differential equations
concepts.description: Ordinary differential equations, their order and degree, the solution of differential equation by the method of separation of variables, solution of a homogeneous and linear differential equation of the type dy/dx + p(x)y = q(x)

concepts.name: Coordinate system and lines
concepts.description: Cartesian system of rectangular coordinates, distance formula, sections formula, locus and its equation, the slope of a line, parallel and perpendicular lines, intercepts of a line on the co-ordinate axis

concepts.name: Straight line equations and angles
concepts.description: Various forms of equations of a line, intersection of lines, angles between two lines, conditions for concurrence of three lines, the distance of a point from a line

concepts.name: Triangle centers
concepts.description: Co-ordinate of the centroid, orthocentre and circumcentre of a triangle

concepts.name: Circle and conic sections
concepts.description: Circle, conic sections: Standard form of equations of a circle, general equation, radius and centre, equation with endpoints of diameter

concepts.name: Equations of parabola, ellipse and hyperbola
concepts.description: Equations of conic sections in standard forms

concepts.name: 3D coordinates and lines
concepts.description: Coordinates of a point in space, distance between points, section formula, direction ratios and cosines, angle between intersecting lines

concepts.name: Line equations and skew lines
concepts.description: Equation of a line; Skew lines, shortest distance and its equation

concepts.name: Vectors and operations
concepts.description: Vectors and scalars, addition, components in 2D and 3D, scalar and vector products

concepts.name: Dispersion measures
concepts.description: Calculation of mean, median, mode, standard deviation, variance, mean deviation for grouped and ungrouped data

concepts.name: Probability
concepts.description: Probability of an event, addition and multiplication theorems, Baye's theorem, probability distribution of a random variable

concepts.name: Trigonometric functions and identities
concepts.description: Trigonometrical identities and functions, inverse trig functions and their properties

subtopics.name: Units, Kinematics and Laws of Motion

concepts.name: Units, dimensions and errors
concepts.description: Units of measurements, SI Units, least count, significant figures, Errors, Dimensions of Physics quantities, dimensional analysis and its applications

concepts.name: Motion in one dimension
concepts.description: The frame of reference, motion in a straight line, speed and velocity, uniformly accelerated motion, graphs, relative velocity

concepts.name: Motion in two dimensions
concepts.description: Motion in a plane, projectile motion, uniform circular motion

concepts.name: Newton’s laws of motion
concepts.description: Force, inertia, Newton's Laws, momentum, impulse, conservation of linear momentum, equilibrium of concurrent forces

concepts.name: Friction and circular motion
concepts.description: Static and Kinetic friction, laws of friction, rolling friction, centripetal force and its applications

concepts.name: Work and energy
concepts.description: Work done by constant and variable force, kinetic and potential energy, work-energy theorem, power

concepts.name: Energy conservation and collisions
concepts.description: Conservation of mechanical energy, motion in a vertical circle, elastic and inelastic collisions

concepts.name: Rotational dynamics
concepts.description: Centre of mass, torque, angular momentum, conservation of angular momentum

concepts.name: Moment of inertia
concepts.description: Moment of inertia, radius of gyration, parallel and perpendicular axis theorems, rotational motion equations

concepts.name: Gravitational laws
concepts.description: Universal law of gravitation, acceleration due to gravity and its variation with altitude and depth

concepts.name: Planetary motion
concepts.description: Kepler's laws of planetary motion, gravitational potential and potential energy

concepts.name: Satellites and escape velocity
concepts.description: Escape velocity, orbital velocity, time period and energy of satellites

concepts.name: Elastic properties
concepts.description: Stress-strain relationship, Hooke’s law, Young’s modulus, bulk modulus and rigidity modulus

concepts.name: Fluid mechanics
concepts.description: Pressure, Pascal’s law, viscosity, Stoke’s law, Bernoulli’s principle and applications

concepts.name: Surface tension
concepts.description: Surface energy, surface tension, angle of contact, excess pressure, capillary rise

concepts.name: Heat and calorimetry
concepts.description: Heat, temperature, thermal expansion, specific heat, latent heat, heat transfer

concepts.name: Thermodynamics laws
concepts.description: Zeroth, First and Second laws of thermodynamics, isothermal and adiabatic processes

concepts.name: Kinetic theory of gases
concepts.description: Equation of state, RMS speed, degrees of freedom, equipartition of energy, mean free path

concepts.name: Simple harmonic motion
concepts.description: SHM equations, energy, spring systems, simple pendulum

concepts.name: Wave motion
concepts.description: Wave motion, superposition, standing waves, beats, harmonics

concepts.name: Electric charges and fields
concepts.description: Coulomb’s law, electric field, electric dipole, field lines

concepts.name: Gauss’s law
concepts.description: Electric flux, Gauss’s law and applications

concepts.name: Electric potential and capacitors
concepts.description: Electric potential, equipotential surfaces, capacitors, dielectrics, energy stored

concepts.name: Current electricity
concepts.description: Ohm’s law, resistivity, drift velocity, Kirchhoff’s laws, Wheatstone bridge

concepts.name: Magnetic effects of current
concepts.description: Biot–Savart law, Ampere’s law, magnetic force

concepts.name: Electromagnetic induction
concepts.description: Faraday’s laws, Lenz’s law, inductance, eddy currents

concepts.name: Alternating current
concepts.description: AC circuits, RMS values, LCR circuits, resonance, transformers

concepts.name: Electromagnetic waves
concepts.description: Displacement current, EM waves, EM spectrum and applications

concepts.name: Ray optics
concepts.description: Reflection, refraction, mirrors, lenses, optical instruments

concepts.name: Wave optics
concepts.description: Interference, diffraction, polarization, Young’s double slit experiment

concepts.name: Dual nature and atoms
concepts.description: Photoelectric effect, de Broglie waves, Bohr model, atomic spectra

concepts.name: Nuclear physics and semiconductors
concepts.description: Nuclear reactions, binding energy, fission, fusion, semiconductor devices and logic gates

concepts.name: Stoichiometry and mole concept
concepts.description: Laws of chemical combination, mole concept, empirical and molecular formulae, stoichiometry

concepts.name: Atomic models
concepts.description: Bohr model, photoelectric effect, de Broglie relation, uncertainty principle

concepts.name: Quantum mechanical model
concepts.description: Orbitals, quantum numbers, electronic configuration, Aufbau, Pauli and Hund rules

concepts.name: Chemical bonding theories
concepts.description: Ionic, covalent bonding, VSEPR, hybridization, MOT, hydrogen bonding

concepts.name: Thermodynamics
concepts.description: First and Second laws, enthalpy, entropy, Gibbs free energy and equilibrium

concepts.name: Chemical and ionic equilibrium
concepts.description: Law of equilibrium, Le Chatelier’s principle, pH, buffers, solubility product

concepts.name: Electrochemistry
concepts.description: Electrochemical cells, Nernst equation, electrode potential

concepts.name: Chemical kinetics
concepts.description: Reaction rate, order, rate law, Arrhenius equation

concepts.name: Periodic trends
concepts.description: Periodic law, trends in atomic size, ionization energy and reactivity

concepts.name: Coordination compounds
concepts.description: Werner’s theory, isomerism, bonding theories, magnetic and colour properties

concepts.name: Structural concepts
concepts.description: Hybridization, isomerism, nomenclature, reaction mechanisms

concepts.name: Reaction intermediates
concepts.description: Carbocations, free radicals, nucleophiles and electrophiles

concepts.name: Hydrocarbons
concepts.description: Alkanes, alkenes, alkynes and aromatic compounds

concepts.name: Functional groups
concepts.description: Alcohols, aldehydes, ketones, acids, amines and biomolecules
